conservative.name: Covering Fire
conservative.requirements: A ranged weapon without the Reload quality and a ready supply of ammunition

success.description: You maintain covering fire as described above
As above, and you hit 1 enemy in the area for normal damage

boon.description: An ally within close range of you may immediately perform a free manouevre

bane.description: An enemy in the target area may make a free manoeuvre, without suffering the penalties listed above

reckless.name: Covering Fire
reckless.requirements: A ranged weapon without the Reload quality and a ready supply of ammunition, target engagement within medium range

success.description: You hit the target engagement with a hail of fire, sending the enemies scrambling. All enemies in the engagement suffer 1 fatigue

boon.description: An ally within close range of the target engagement may make a free manoeuvre

bane.description: Allies in the engagement also suffer 1 fatigue
